MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-16-2011 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 302

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF GUARDIAN GROUP, INC'S APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER FOR ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF ATTACHMENT. NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF'S APPLICATION FOR WRIT OF ATTACHMENT IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT PROVIDED EVIDENCE THAT ITS CLAIMS ARISE OUT OF SERVICES TO DEFENDANT IN TRADE, BUSINESS OR PROFESSION. MOREOVER, PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO FILE ITS AMENDED COMPLAINT AND CANNOT SHOW IT WILL PREVAIL IN THIS ACTION WITHOUT DOING SO. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. (302/LMG) JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI; NOT REPORTED

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Aug-16-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF GUARDIAN GROUP, INC'S APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER FOR ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF ATTACHMENT. No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff's application for writ of attachment is denied. Plaintiff has not provided evidence that its claims arise out of services to defendant in trade, business or profession. Moreover, plaintiff has failed to file its amended complaint and cannot show it will prevail in this action without doing so. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Not reported

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-04-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT SUSAN BALDINI'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.
Appearances: John Wiley (831.0500) for defendant and moving party; no other appearances.
The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: sustained with leave to amend, no opposition filed. Order signed in open court. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
